message:
Fix tour tooltip positioning and step definitions

- Fix feedback/alerts tooltips cut off on right edge by using 'left' placement
- Position near-top tooltips at top of viewport instead of centering
- Add useAbsoluteLeft flag to disable CSS transform for top-aligned items
- Add delayed repositioning for add-card/templates steps (layout shift fix)
- Add data-tour="drilldown" to first cluster row in ClusterHealth
- Rename "AI Drill-Down" to "Drill-Down"
- Rename "AI-Powered Search" to "Search"
- Change AI recommendations placement from 'right' to 'bottom'

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

-    placement: 'right',
+    placement: 'bottom',
     highlight: true,
   },
